message:
🌱 Add litmus: Unable to add tags to an existing experiment mission (#1250)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litmus-4336-unable-to-add-tags-to-an-existing-experiment",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litmus: Unable to add tags to an existing experiment",
+    "description": "Unable to add tags to an existing experiment. Community-reported issue.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litmus troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litmus deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus -n litmus --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litmus configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litmus configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus\nkubectl get configmap -n litmus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litmus\n```\n**What happened**:\n\nAfter successful creation of experiment through ChaosCenter UI, if you press edit, go to overview , add tags and try to save the experiment you get error `experiment name should be unique, duplicate experiment found with name:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Unable to add tags to an existing experiment",
+        "description": "Refactored the variable `Name` to `ExperimentName`.\n\nThere was a bug which was caused because of using wrong variable name.\n`Name` was used in place of `ExperimentName` which was causing to trigger the `validateDuplicateExperimentName` even when we edit experiment details.\n\n## Types of changes\n\nWhat types of changes does your code introduce to Litmus? Put an `x` in the boxes that apply\nPut an `x` in the boxes that apply. You can also fill these out after creating the PR. If you're unsure about\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Unable to add tags to an existing experiment is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litmus -n litmus --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litmus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Refactored the variable `Name` to `ExperimentName`.\n\nThere was a bug which was caused because of using wrong variable name.\n`Name` was used in place of `ExperimentName` which was causing to trigger the `validateDuplicateExperimentName` even when we edit experiment details.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+    },
